title: Property Consultant - Sunteck Realty - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Sunteck Realty - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Sunteck Realty, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
